scripts.test:live: npm run test:smoke:api && npm run test:browser
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.audit:all: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix ./src/client audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix ./src/server audit --audit-level=high
scripts.build:all: npm --prefix ./src/server run build && npm --prefix ./src/client run build
scripts.ci:verify: npm run repo:sanity && npm --prefix ./src/server run env:check && npm --prefix ./src/client run env:check -- --production && npm run test && npm run build:all && npm run audit:all && npm run deps:check && npm run licenses:check
